ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team name that the manager belongs to */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the investment belongs to */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "fund_ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the fund */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the investment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the investment within the portfolio */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., ETF, Mutual Fund) */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was established */,
  "fund_manager" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the metrics belong to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk measurement associated with the portfolio */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark used for performance evaluation */,
  "tracking_error" REAL /* Tracking error of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_holdings" (
  "etf_holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF holding */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the company in the ETF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_holdings_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES company ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES company ("company_id")
)
